scripts.clean: git clean -xdf node_modules .turbo apps/*/.next apps/*/.turbo packages/*/.turbo
scripts.dev: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev --parallel
scripts.dev:api: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev --filter=@anodizex/api
scripts.dev:dashboard: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev --filter=@anodizex/dashboard
scripts.dev:jobs: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev --filter=@anodizex/jobs
scripts.dev:website: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev --filter=@anodizex/website
scripts.dev:websites: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev --filter=@anodizex/website --filter=@anodizex/dashboard --filter=@anodizex/jobs
scripts.dev:portless: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev:portless --parallel
scripts.dev:website:portless: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev:portless --filter=@anodizex/website
scripts.dev:dashboard:portless: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev:portless --filter=@anodizex/dashboard
scripts.dev:api:portless: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev:portless --filter=@anodizex/api
scripts.dev:websites:portless: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev:portless --filter=@anodizex/website --filter=@anodizex/dashboard --filter=@anodizex/jobs
scripts.db:local:migrate: bun run db:start && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://anodizex:anodizex@localhost:55435/anodizex TURBO_UI=true bun --filter @anodizex/db db:migrate
scripts.db:local:push: bun run db:start && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://anodizex:anodizex@localhost:55435/anodizex TURBO_UI=true bun --filter @anodizex/db db:push
scripts.jobs: bun run dev:prepare && bun scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode local -- turbo dev --parallel --filter=@anodizex/jobs
scripts.lint: biome check package.json turbo.json scripts && turbo lint
scripts.start:dashboard:prod: bun --cwd apps/dashboard ../../scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode production -- bun run next start -p 4101
scripts.start:website:prod: bun --cwd apps/website ../../scripts/with-workspace-env.mjs --mode production -- bun run next start -p 4100
